findings.description: Duplicate YAML key: `clusterInventory:` appears twice in succession. YAML parsers silently discard the first; Helm will lose all values under the first block.
Extra closing brace `}` added after the clusterInventory section produces invalid JSON; Helm will reject the chart with a JSON parse error.

CACert regression: `CACert: &oidcCACert` now always passes a pointer (to empty string when not set) instead of nil. Downstream nil-checks will incorrectly see a non-nil pointer when no CA cert is configured.
Merge commit 'Merge branch main into feature/oidc-auto-login' still present; should be rebased away per project convention.
Two commits with subject 'Address Copilot review comments' violate project convention of meaningful commit subjects; should be squashed or rewritten.
OIDC auto-login useEffect still lacks Vitest component tests; requested in multiple previous re-reviews.
`oidcUrl.searchParams.set('dt', Date())` uses Date() string representation; prefer `Date.now().toString()` for a compact URL-safe cache-buster.
All godoc comments stripped from exported and internal functions; Go convention requires godoc on exported symbols.
Promoting inventorymetadata types into the kubeconfig package eliminates a sub-package and simplifies import graph.
Three new unit tests covering oidcAutoLogin set/preserve/clear semantics validate the payload-key guard correctly.
window.opener detection correctly differentiates popup vs full-page OIDC flows.
sessionStorage (not localStorage) usage for loop prevention correctly clears on tab close.
Fallback to 'en' when i18n.language is falsy is a safe defensive fix for the race condition during OIDC redirect.
